chapters.title: One brother having mean profession, childless,
chapters.content_preview: 10. One brother having mean profession, childless,  1.  hit by diseases and being a trouble maker; Immovable ascendant - Sama Nadiamsa; Scorpio ascendant - ibid; Rahu in the 9th giving longevity, knowledge of scriptures

chapters.title: The remainder will indicate eight kinds of
chapters.content_preview: 8. The remainder will indicate eight kinds of different effects, viz. disease, gain etc. Accord- ingly, the result of the dasa should be understood.  (©) Count the number of Nakshatras from the dasa lord through the sub period lord. Multiply the said figure by 7 and divide by 8.

chapters.title: A great danger will strike him during his 36th
chapters.content_preview: 28. A great danger will strike him during his 36th year. Trouble from fever and death of children being born will come to pass at the age of 22.  (b) The death of the above native will occur in the dasa of Aries (KCD) or in the dasa of ascendant lord (Vimsottari). Saturn in trans
